description_long: This is an unusually tall, multi-layered hamburger stacked vertically with several buns, patties, and toppings, presented on a round wooden platter. The hamburger features at least four visible beef patties, each separated by layers of leafy green lettuce, slices of tomato, and melted cheese. The top and bottom buns are plain and lightly browned, with no visible sesame seeds. Surrounding the base of the hamburger are numerous golden-brown potato wedges, arranged in a circular pattern on the platter. The overall appearance is visually striking and exaggerated, resembling a novelty or challenge burger. The surface textures range from the soft, matte buns to the crisp lettuce and glossy cheese.
description: A towering, multi-layered hamburger with several buns, patties, lettuce, tomato, and cheese, served on a wooden platter with potato wedges. The burger is visually striking and exaggerated in height.
description_view_0: The front view shows the stacked hamburger with all layers visible, including lettuce, tomato, cheese, and patties, with potato wedges arranged around the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the vertical stacking of the burger, with leafy lettuce protruding and a clear view of the potato wedges encircling the platter.
description_view_2: From this angle, the cheese and tomato slices are more prominent, and the layering of the ingredients is clearly visible, with the potato wedges forming a dense ring.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the back of the burger, showing the stacked buns and patties, with lettuce and cheese peeking out, and the potato wedges evenly distributed around the base.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings such as lettuce, tomato, and cheese are layered between each patty, with lettuce and cheese protruding from the sides and tomato slices visible near the top. The toppings are distributed evenly throughout the height of the burger, creating a stacked, multi-layered appearance.
